'use strict'; var isGlob = require('is-glob'); var pathPosixDirname = require('path').posix.dirname; var isWin32 = require('os').platform() === 'win32'; var slash = '/'; var backslash = /\\/g; var enclosure = /[\{\[].*[\}\]]$/; var globby = /(^|[^\\])([\{\[]|\([^\)]+$)/; var escaped = /\\([\!\*\?\|\[\]\(\)\{\}])/g; /** * @param {string} str * @param {Object} opts * @param {boolean} [opts.flipBackslashes=true] * @returns {string} */ module.exports = function globParent(str, opts) { var options = Object.assign({ flipBackslashes: true }, opts); // flip windows path separators if (options.flipBackslashes && isWin32 && str.indexOf(slash) < 0) { str = str.replace(backslash, slash); } // special case for strings ending in enclosure containing path separator if (enclosure.test(str)) { str += slash; } // preserves full path in case of trailing path separator str += 'a'; // remove path parts that are globby do { str = pathPosixDirname(str); } while (isGlob(str) || globby.test(str)); // remove escape chars and return result return str.replace(escaped, '$1'); };
